Meant primarily for the [[Bodyguard/Legends|personal guards]] of dignitaries, '''Cinnagar plate armor''' was designed with appearances in mind. Due to its role, however, the [[Armor/Legends|armor]] was still effective at protecting against a wide range of attacks including sonic assaults.

{{Tech-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Cinnagar plate armor was intended to appear in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' but it was removed from the final version of the game. As the armor was still present in the game files, it could be obtained using cheat codes.
